findings.evidence: PR adds `theorem apply_mem_range (f : Hom R C M N) (m : M) : f m ∈ range ...`; Mathlib uses `theorem mem_range_self` for the same API pattern, e.g. `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Ring/Subring/Basic.lean:256`, `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Module/Submodule/Range.lean:75`, and `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Lie/Subalgebra.lean:299`.
findings.fix: Rename it to `mem_range_self` in `Comodule.Hom`, matching Mathlib range APIs.
findings.issue: `apply_mem_range` names the application/proof shape rather than the standard conclusion `f m ∈ f.range`.

summary: One introduced range-membership lemma uses nonstandard naming for the conclusion. Rename it to match Mathlib’s hom range API.
